requestText: i'll probably have a yogurt snack. 200g light yogurt, 10g cocoa, 6g cacao nibs, 1tbsp pb powder.
responseText:

But it **did not get written to your diary** in this run, so your day total is still floating offshore unconfirmed. If you want, re-send it and use **pb powder in grams** next time so the little nutrition goblins have less to trip over.

requestText: I might need to stop early. My back and knees aren’t feeling super great. I may end early and just go for a walk instead.
responseText:
Smart call, dude. Two solid supersets is real work — don't let the ego talk you into grinding through warning signs from your back and knees. That's how a leg day becomes a six-week layoff.

Walk is actually a *perfect* swap — active recovery, still gets blood moving, doesn't stress the joints. Plus you already banked 16k steps yesterday, so your body's clearly down with the movement.

Whenever you're done, just say the word and I'll close the session. Want me to log the walk too when you finish?
